Debut of DFV Lotus second in Constructors' Championship
Debut of DFV Lotus second in Constructors' Championship

Cosworth powered cars won all but one Grand Prix. Graham Hill ( Lotus ) won Drivers' Championship , 2nd and 3rd placed drivers were also Cosworth powered. The 3 Cosworth-powered teams took 1st ( Lotus ), 2nd and 3rd places in the Constructors' Championship .

Cosworth powered cars won all but one Grand Prix. Graham Hill ( Lotus ) won Drivers' Championship , 2nd and 3rd placed drivers were also Cosworth powered. The 3 Cosworth-powered teams took 1st ( Lotus ), 2nd and 3rd places in the Constructors' Championship .
